---
title: "readme_pathlyXYZ"
author: "jmenblaz"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## pathlyXYZ

***Keywords:** Movement-ecologty · Biologging · 3D-Movement · Animal-tracking · Trajectory simulation · Vertical dimension*

**pathlyXYZ** is an open-access R package to simulate 3D movement paths (X, Y, Z) from empirical biologging trajectories.

```{}
```
